name: Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup (or cream of celery soup)
1 package Stove Top stuffing mix (or whatever's on sale)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken breasts in a pan and cover with water. Add some seasoning if desired.
2. Cook the chicken until it is done.
3. Allow the chicken to cool, then chop into bite-sized pieces. Set aside.
4. Make the stuffing mix according to package directions.
5. Grease a large glass baking dish.
6. Pour chicken soup, sour cream, and milk into the dish and stir to combine.
7. Spread the stuffing mixture over the top of the casserole.
8. Place in a 350 degree oven for about 30-40 minutes, or until the sauce starts to bubble.
9. Optionally, add chopped onions, mushrooms, and white wine for extra flavor.
